text: Judge vacates convictions of 4 Proud Boys in Jan. 6 Capitol insurrection - CBS News
fullText: A federal judge on Friday agreed to dismiss the convictions of four members of the far-right Proud Boys group for their actions in the Jan. 6 Capitol riot.

text: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier - CNBC

text: Randolph Mantooth, who played medic in NBC’s ‘Emergency!’, dies at 80 - NBC News
fullText: LOS ANGELES — Actor Randolph Mantooth, best known for his role as firefighter and medic John Gage in NBC’s “Emergency!” television series in the 1970s, has died at age 80 after a long illness, his family said Friday.

fullText: Graham Platner has submitted his paperwork to formally withdraw from Maine’s U.S. Senate race, officially ending an upstart yet troubled campaign whose dissolution threatens Democrats’ pursuit of chamber control. The Maine Democratic Party announced later Fri…

text: Legionnaires' outbreak hits New York as officials rush to test water towers - BBC
fullText: To date, 46 people have been infected from breathing mist from bacteria-filled water coolers on the Upper East side.

text: Your age during the pandemic likely impacts whether you own a home - The Washington Post
fullText: Your age when the pandemic hit could set the trajectory for the rest of your life, new analysis suggests. It was better to be 22 than 21.
